title: Japan Stock Company Establishment Registration Application (Board of Directors Installed, Public Subscription)
description: The Legal Affairs Bureau (法務局, part of the Ministry of Justice)'s Stock Company Establishment Registration Application (株式会社設立登記申請書), filed with the local Legal Affairs Bureau/branch office/sub-office having jurisdiction over the company's registered head office, to legally bring a newly-incorporated kabushiki-gaisha (株式会社, stock company) into existence — Japanese company law makes incorporation effective only upon this registration (会社法第49条). This document models the 'board of directors installed, public subscription' (取締役会を設置する株式会社の募集設立) variant: the company installs a board of directors (取締役会設置会社), and, unlike sibling document `jp/houmukyoku/stock-company-establishment-registration-application-board-of-directors` (the same board-installed company's promoter-only 発起設立 counterpart), the promoters solicit third-party subscribers for part of the shares issued at incorporation (募集設立) rather than subscribing for all of them themselves — the two remaining published variants (no board + incorporation by promoters, no board + public subscription) each model a different combination and remain out of scope here. The public-subscription procedure changes what this document's own attachment list requires in three disclosed ways relative to the board-installed/promoter-only sibling: a share-subscription-application attachment (since third-party subscribers must formally apply), a bank-or-trust-company funds-custody certificate in place of a plain payment certificate (Companies Act art. 64's stricter custody requirement for solicited funds), and an organizational general meeting's minutes (Companies Act art. 87-92 requires a meeting of all subscribers before incorporation is complete) — see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosed comparison. The registered 'matters to be registered' content itself (company identity, share capital structure, and officer particulars, including the board-installed variant's own representative-director-election and mandatory-auditor rules) is otherwise unchanged from the promoter-only sibling. A real submission also encloses a substantial packet of supporting documents (articles of incorporation, promoters'/subscribers' resolutions and consents, capital-custody proof, identity/seal certificates, and, if an agent files on the company's behalf, a power of attorney) — modelled here only as `documents[]` attachment requirements; the internal content of each of those supporting documents is out of scope, a candidate for a future companion-schedule cycle. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Japan or the Ministry of Justice. See VERIFICATION.md for the full field-by-field source mapping, the mock-data test run, and every disclosed scope decision.

authority.name: Legal Affairs Bureau (法務局), Ministry of Justice

source.documentRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書（取締役会を設置する株式会社の募集設立）／Stock Company Establishment Registration Application (company with a board of directors, public subscription) — blank application template ('申請書様式'), item 1-2 of the Legal Affairs Bureau's own '商業・法人登記の申請書様式' ('Commercial/corporate registration application forms') index at https://houmukyoku.moj.go.jp/homu/COMMERCE_11-1.html.

verification.notes: GOV-2152: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. This registry's own CATALOG.md Known Gaps item 6 (via GOV-2019/GOV-2026/GOV-2035/GOV-2049's own VERIFICATION.md records) had flagged the Legal Affairs Bureau's two remaining sibling stock-company-incorporation variants (rows 1-2 and 1-4 of the same houmukyoku.moj.go.jp index page already sourced for the two already-published siblings, rows 1-3 and 1-1) as this registry's sole open Japan companion-schedule candidates, explicitly noting row 1-2 (board installed + public subscription) as the next candidate once the board-axis pattern was established (done by GOV-2049). This cycle picked it up directly. Fetched the blank template (https://houmukyoku.moj.go.jp/homu/content/001249316.pdf, HTTP 200, 584493 bytes) and its companion worked example (https://houmukyoku.moj.go.jp/homu/content/001252642.pdf, HTTP 200, 659157 bytes) directly from the index page's row 1-2, both with a browser User-Agent (houmukyoku.moj.go.jp returns HTTP 403 to a plain curl request but HTTP 200 to an ordinary desktop-browser User-Agent, the same narrow bot-mitigation finding recorded by every prior Japan cycle). Both PDFs have zero AcroForm/Widget annotations (confirmed via pdfjs-dist's getAnnotations()) but a full, genuine Japanese text layer, extracted with pdfjs-dist (pinned 3.11.174) via getTextContent with x/y-coordinate row-grouping, the same technique used throughout this registry's Japan documents. Cross-checked line-by-line against the already-published board-installed/promoter-only sibling's own source PDFs (re-fetched fresh this cycle) to isolate exactly what changes: the registered 'matters to be registered' content (annex page) is byte-for-byte identical in structure to the sibling's own annex (same officer/auditor/branch-office fields, same illustrative values); the attachment list differs in three disclosed ways (a new 株式申込書 share-subscription-application attachment; 払込金保管証明書, a bank/trust-company funds-custody certificate, in place of the sibling's plain 払込みを証する書面 payment certificate; and a new 創立総会議事録 organizational-meeting-minutes attachment), all grounded in Companies Act arts. 64 and 87-92's own stricter public-subscription procedure. `node tools/verify-sources.mjs registry/jp/houmukyoku/stock-company-establishment-registration-application-board-of-directors-public-subscription/1.0.0` reports 0 warnings; see VERIFICATION.md for the full source list, extraction diff (including a disclosed font/text-positioning artifact on the blank template's own 定款/発起人の同意書 attachment row, cross-checked against the worked example), and every disclosed scope decision. This deepens rather than widens Japan's Business Formation vertical coverage (still 4 of 6 verticals: Visa, National ID, Business Formation, Taxes).

fields.name: companyNameFurigana
fields.label: Company Name — Furigana
fields.description: フリガナ — the katakana reading of the company's trade name, excluding the part denoting the company type ('株式会社'). Per the worked-example's own annotation, written left-justified with any internal spaces removed; this furigana is published via the National Tax Agency's corporate-number ('houjin bangou') publication site and does not itself appear on the resulting Certificate of Registered Matters.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, row 'フリガナ'

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Trade Name (Company Name)
fields.description: 商号 — the company's registered trade name, including '株式会社' (either as a prefix or suffix per the promoters' choice). Reused verbatim as the 「商号」 line of the 登記すべき事項 (matters to be registered) passage and again in the signature/filing block below.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, row '商号'; restated at 登記すべき事項 '「商号」' and in the filing block ('申請人 ... (商号)')

fields.name: headOfficeAddress
fields.label: Head Office Address
fields.description: 本店 — the company's registered head office address. The source form provides one free-text block (no structured prefecture/city/block/number sub-boxes). Reused verbatim as the 「本店」 line of the 登記すべき事項 passage and again in the filing block ('申請人 (本店)').
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, row '本店'; restated at 登記すべき事項 '「本店」' and in the filing block ('申請人 (本店)')

fields.name: organizationalMeetingCompletionDate
fields.label: Date the Public-Subscription Incorporation Procedure Was Completed
fields.description: 登記の事由 — the form's fixed reason-for-registration phrase is '[date]募集設立の手続終了' ('as of [date], the procedure for public-subscription incorporation was completed'). The worked example's own annotation instructs the applicant to 'record the date the organizational general meeting (創立総会) concluded, etc.' (会社法第911条第2項参照) — the organizational meeting being the last mandatory step of the 募集設立 procedure (share solicitation, subscription, the organizational meeting, and officer selection), distinguishing this date's basis from the promoter-only sibling document's own 発起設立-completion date, which has no organizational-meeting step to reference.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, row '登記の事由' ('令和 年 月 日募集設立の手続終了'); worked example, page 1, annotation '創立総会の終了の日等を記載してください（会社法第911条第2項参照）。'

fields.name: methodOfPublicNotice
fields.label: Method of Public Notice
fields.description: 「公告をする方法」 — how the company will publish its legally-required public notices (e.g. of annual accounts). Both the worked example and the model articles of incorporation this source publishes show the same value, '官報に掲載してする' ('by publication in the Official Gazette'), the default method under Companies Act art. 939 when a company's articles do not otherwise specify one of the Act's other statutory methods (a daily newspaper, or electronic public notice). Since neither source document in this cycle's review enumerates those other statutory methods itself, this field is modelled as free text rather than a fabricated enum, mirroring the treatment of the same field on both already-published sibling documents.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「公告をする方法」官報に掲載してする。'

fields.name: businessPurposes
fields.label: Business Purposes (Objectives)
fields.description: 「目的」 — the company's numbered list of business objectives, as they will appear on the Certificate of Registered Matters. The worked example's own three-item list ends with the standard catch-all clause '前各号に附帯する一切の事業' ('any and all business incidental to each of the preceding items'), a customary final entry. Modelled as one free-text field (numbered items separated by newlines/semicolons), per this registry's established GSP-0009 treatment of a source's own repeating/numbered list where GovSchema v0.3 has no native array type.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「目的」１ ○○の製造販売 ２ ○○の売買 ３ 前各号に附帯する一切の事業'

fields.name: totalAuthorizedShares
fields.label: Total Number of Authorized Shares
fields.description: 「発行可能株式総数」 — the total number of shares the company is authorized to issue (its 'authorized capital' share ceiling), not the number actually issued at incorporation.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「発行可能株式総数」８００株'

fields.name: totalIssuedShares
fields.label: Total Number of Issued Shares
fields.description: 「発行済株式の総数並びに種類及び数」 — the total number of shares actually issued at incorporation, including both promoters' own subscriptions and third-party subscribers' shares solicited under 募集設立. The source heading itself also asks for the shares' 'type(s)' when a company issues more than one class of share; the worked example populates only a single running total ('「発行済株式の総数」２００株') consistent with a single class of ordinary shares (普通株式), the common case for a small closely-held incorporation. A multi-class share breakdown, and a promoter/subscriber split of this total, are out of scope for this v1.0.0, mirroring the same scope decision on both already-published sibling documents.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「発行済株式の総数並びに種類及び数」「発行済株式の総数」２００株'

fields.name: capitalAmount
fields.label: Amount of Capital
fields.description: 「資本金の額」 — the company's capital (share capital) at incorporation, in Japanese yen. Japanese company law has had no statutory minimum capital requirement since the 2006 Companies Act reform (a company may incorporate with capital as low as 1 yen), so no floor beyond a positive amount is enforced here.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「資本金の額」金１０００万円'

fields.name: hasShareTransferRestriction
fields.label: Shares Subject to a Transfer-Approval Restriction
fields.description: 「株式の譲渡制限に関する規定」 — whether acquiring the company's shares by transfer requires the company's prior approval. Virtually universal for a small, closely-held incorporation of this kind (both source documents show the restriction clause present). As on the board-installed/promoter-only sibling document, Companies Act art. 139(1) makes the board of directors the default approving body for a board-installed company such as this one, unless the articles of incorporation specify otherwise — a distinction disclosed here rather than modelled as its own field, since neither source PDF prints the approving body's identity on this line.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 heading '「株式の譲渡制限に関する規定」'

fields.name: shareTransferRestrictionClause
fields.label: Share Transfer Restriction — Clause Text
fields.description: The restriction's exact wording as it will appear on the Certificate of Registered Matters. Both source documents show the identical standard clause: '当会社の株式を譲渡により取得するには、当会社の承認を受けなければならない。' ('A person who wishes to acquire the Company's shares by transfer must obtain the Company's approval.'), the same wording as both already-published sibling documents.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「株式の譲渡制限に関する規定」当会社の株式を譲渡により取得するには、当会社の承認を受けなければならない。'

fields.name: directorNames
fields.label: Directors — Names
fields.description: 「役員に関する事項」「資格」取締役「氏名」— the full names of every director (取締役) at incorporation, including whichever one is separately elected representative director below. As on the board-installed/promoter-only sibling document, this variant's representative director is elected by resolution of the incorporation-time directors themselves — see representativeDirectorSelectionDocumentFile below. The worked example lists three directors; the source's registry entry discloses only each director's name (not address), modelled as one free-text field (names separated by semicolons), per this registry's established GSP-0009 treatment of a source's own repeating officer table.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項, three repeated rows '「役員に関する事項」「資格」取締役「氏名」○○○○'

fields.name: representativeDirectorName
fields.label: Representative Director — Name
fields.description: 「役員に関する事項」「資格」代表取締役「氏名」— the director elected by the board of incorporation-time directors to represent the company (代表取締役); one of the names already listed in directorNames, but registered a second time together with an address because a representative director's address (unlike an ordinary director's) is itself a matter of public registration.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「役員に関する事項」「資格」代表取締役「住所」... 「氏名」○○○○'

fields.name: representativeDirectorAddress
fields.label: Representative Director — Address
fields.description: 「役員に関する事項」「資格」代表取締役「住所」— the representative director's residential address, publicly registered (unlike an ordinary director's address, which is not).
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 登記すべき事項 '「役員に関する事項」「資格」代表取締役「住所」○県○市○町○丁目○番○号'

fields.name: hasAuditor
fields.label: Auditor Appointed at Incorporation
fields.description: 設立時監査役 — whether the company appointed an auditor (監査役) at incorporation. As on the board-installed/promoter-only sibling document, Companies Act art. 327(2) requires a board-installed company to have an auditor, unless the company instead adopts a committee-based governance structure (指名委員会等設置会社/監査等委員会設置会社) or is a non-public company with an accounting advisor (会計参与) installed — neither of those narrower alternative structures is modelled by this document, so this field is required rather than optionally gated, consistent with this variant's own worked example, which does show one auditor, and the source's own attachment note grouping the director's and auditor's identity-verification requirement together ('設立時取締役、設立時監査役（印鑑証明書を添付しない役員）について...本人確認証明書を添付します。').
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 5, 登記すべき事項 '「役員に関する事項」「資格」監査役「氏名」○○○○'; page 2, 添付書類 note on 本人確認証明書

fields.name: auditorNames
fields.label: Auditors — Names
fields.description: The name(s) of the auditor(s) (監査役) appointed at incorporation. Modelled as one free-text field (names separated by semicolons) for the same repeating-table reason as directorNames. The worked example shows a single auditor.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 5, 登記すべき事項 '「役員に関する事項」「資格」監査役「氏名」○○○○'

fields.name: auditorScopeLimitedToAccounting
fields.label: Auditor's Scope of Audit Limited to Accounting Matters
fields.description: 「監査役の監査の範囲に関する事項」「監査役の監査の範囲を会計に関するものに限定する旨の定款の定めがある」 — whether the articles of incorporation limit the auditor's statutory scope of audit to accounting matters only (as opposed to the default, broader scope covering both accounting and the directors' general conduct of business). Not present in either source PDF's blank template (which defers the entire 登記すべき事項 body to the annex/別紙), only in the worked example's own annex; modelled as optional since the underlying articles-of-incorporation clause it reflects is itself optional.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 5, 登記すべき事項 '「役員に関する事項」「資格」監査役の監査の範囲に関する事項「役員に関するその他の事項」監査役の監査の範囲を会計に関するものに限定する旨の定款の定めがある'

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Application (Filing) Date
fields.description: The date printed directly above the destination Legal Affairs Bureau line: '上記のとおり、登記の申請をします。令和 年 月 日' ('As stated above, I hereby apply for registration. [date]').
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 2, filing block '令和 年 月 日'

fields.name: legalAffairsBureauOffice
fields.label: Destination Legal Affairs Bureau / Branch / Sub-office
fields.description: 「＿＿法務局＿＿支局／出張所 御中」— the specific Legal Affairs Bureau (or its branch/局, or sub-office/出張所) having jurisdiction over the company's registered head office, to which this application is physically or electronically filed.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 2, filing block '法務局 支局 御中 出張所'

fields.name: contactPhoneNumber
fields.label: Contact Phone Number
fields.description: 連絡先の電話番号 — a daytime contact number printed directly under the filing block, with no explicit mandatory/optional marking on either source document; modelled as optional, consistent with how this registry treats an unmarked contact-number line on other Japanese government forms, including both already-published sibling documents.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 2, filing block '連絡先の電話番号'

fields.name: filedByAgent
fields.label: Filed by an Agent (Proxy)
fields.description: Whether an agent/proxy (代理人), rather than the representative director personally, files this application. The worked example's own annotation states the agent's block is 'completed only when an agent files the application' ('代理人が申請する場合にのみ記載し...'), and that in that case the representative director's own seal is not required on the application.
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 3, filing-block annotation on the 代理人 (agent) row

fields.name: agentName
fields.label: Agent — Name
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 3, filing block '上記代理人 ○○○○'

fields.name: agentAddress
fields.label: Agent — Address
fields.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 3, filing block '（注4）→代理人の住所'

documents.label: Articles of Incorporation (定款)
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 添付書類 '定款 １通' (worked example, page 1, 添付書類 '定款 １通'; the blank template's own equivalent row carries a disclosed text-positioning artifact — see VERIFICATION.md)

documents.label: Promoters' Consent Letter on Shares Issued at Incorporation
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 1, 添付書類 '発起人の同意書 ○通' and its note: needed only if the articles of incorporation do not already fix each promoter's allotted shares/payment amount, share-issuance terms, or authorized-share total, or the capital/capital-reserve amounts

documents.label: Share Subscription Application Forms (or a Bank/Trust-Company Handling Certificate)
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書 (worked example), page 1, 添付書類 '株式申込書 ○通', note '（注）銀行又は信託会社等の株式申込取扱証明書を添付することでも構いません。'; not present on either already-published sibling document, since only 募集設立 solicits third-party share subscribers

documents.label: Document Certifying Selection of the Representative Director at Incorporation
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 添付書類 '設立時代表取締役を選定したことを証する書面 １通'; as on the board-installed/promoter-only sibling document, this variant's representative director is always separately elected by the incorporation-time directors' own resolution, so this attachment is always required

documents.label: Letters of Acceptance of Appointment (Directors, Representative Director, and Auditor)
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 添付書類 '設立時取締役、設立時代表取締役及び設立時監査役の就任承諾書 ○通'; the worked example's own note states this may be omitted when the director-selection resolution document itself already records each appointee's on-the-spot acceptance. As on the board-installed/promoter-only sibling document, this attachment label names the representative director and auditor unconditionally, consistent with hasAuditor being required here

documents.label: Seal Certificates
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1, 添付書類 '印鑑証明書 ○通'

documents.label: Identity Verification Documents
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1-2, 添付書類 '本人確認証明書 ○通' and its note: covers every incorporation-time director and auditor who does not separately attach a seal certificate

documents.label: Directors' and Auditor's Investigation Report and Its Own Attachments
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1 (blank template) / page 2 (worked example), 添付書類 '設立時取締役及び設立時監査役の調査報告書及びその附属書類 １通'; the worked example's own note limits this to when the articles of incorporation contain a Companies Act art. 28 extraordinary-incorporation matter (e.g. an in-kind contribution)

documents.label: Bank or Trust Company's Certificate of Custody of Paid-In Funds
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1 (blank template) / page 1 (worked example), 添付書類 '払込金保管証明書 １通', note '（注）銀行等の払込みを取り扱う機関が作成したものです。'; a stricter custody certificate than the board-installed/promoter-only sibling document's equivalent 払込みを証する書面 (plain payment certificate), reflecting Companies Act art. 64's own heightened requirement for funds solicited from third-party subscribers

documents.label: Organizational General Meeting Minutes (創立総会議事録)
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1 (blank template) / page 1 (worked example), 添付書類 '創立総会議事録 １通'; not present on either already-published sibling document, since Companies Act arts. 87-92 require an organizational general meeting of all subscribers only under 募集設立

documents.label: Representative Director's Certificate on the Recording of the Capital Amount
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1 (blank template) / page 2 (worked example), 添付書類 '資本金の額の計上に関する設立時代表取締役の証明書 １通'; the source's own specimen states this is unnecessary when the property contributed at incorporation consists only of cash

documents.label: Power of Attorney
documents.sourceRef: 株式会社設立登記申請書, page 1 (blank template) / page 2 (worked example), 添付書類 '委任状 １通', note '（注）代理人に申請を委任した場合のみ必要です。'
